suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet stability and bal-devnet-7 launch readiness
suggestions.rationale: bal-devnet-7 was planned for launch last week with EIP-8037 fixes. This is critical path for Glamsterdam testing with 8 EIPs now at SFI status.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8254 deposit limit resolution for 200M gas floor
suggestions.rationale: 200M gas floor target requires fixing deposit limit complexity. EIP-8254 was PFI'd but marked as having open questions. This is blocking the gas floor increase for Glamsterdam.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8246 SELFDESTRUCT burn removal CFI confirmation
suggestions.rationale: Action item from #236 to formally CFI this for Glamsterdam. The decision was made but may need process confirmation.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 simplification progress and testing complexity resolution
suggestions.rationale: Despite moving to SFI, #235 noted that 8037 broke ~30% of tests and needs simplification. The action to explore simplifications should be reviewed to ensure devnet stability.
Action item from #236 to update the reorg-depth EIP around 38-day target and gather client feedback. This impacts Engine API changes already merged.
Four EIPs were recently PFI'd for Hegota (#235, #236). With Glamsterdam stabilizing, it's appropriate to check progress and prioritization for the next fork.

suggestions.topic: Account Abstraction strategy and breakout call scheduling
suggestions.rationale: AA breakout was requested in #234 but never scheduled. With Frame transactions CFI'd as non-headliner, alignment on the AA path forward would be valuable, though not immediately blocking.
Engine API changes were merged by #236, but the action to review complexity assessment from #233 was never explicitly closed. Worth a brief update if implementation has progressed.
